title: Gonotheca

Further categorization places Gonotheca in the division Magnoliophyta. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants. As a result, Gonotheca is part of the larger plant kingdom, Plantae.

intro: Gonotheca decurrens is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Gonotheca decurrens include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Gonotheca is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a common ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory and skin issues.
